title: Freak Athletics Protein Shaker Bottle 700ml - Shaker for Protein Shakes - BPA Free Metal Protein Shaker Bottle (Stainless Steel)
features: Premium Stainless Steel Build – Made from durable 18/8 stainless steel, this metal shaker bottle is built to last and resists rust, odors, and stains.
Double-Walled Insulation – Keeps drinks cold for up to 24 hours and hot for up to 12 hours, ideal for both pre-workouts, electrolytes, protein shakes or just water.
Convenient Flip Lid – Designed for convenience and mess-free use, the flip-top lid ensures secure drinking on the go.
Efficient Mixing Ball Included – Comes with a stainless steel spring ball for smooth, lump-free shakes and supplements.
BPA-Free & Cup Holder Friendly – Safe for daily use and sized to fit most car cup holders & smooth finish for easy handling.
description: Product Description Leak-Proof Engineered to prevent spills and leaks, even on the go. BPA-Free Material Crafted from safe and non-toxic materials. 700ml Capacity Ideal size for hydration, with clear volume indicators. Lightweight Compact and lightweight for effortless carrying anywhere. Is this Protein Shaker Bottle BPA-free? Yes, our Protein Shaker Bottle is BPA-free. Is the bottle leak-proof? Absolutely! The twist lid and pull-top cap are designed for a secure, leak-proof experience. Can I use this bottle for mixing supplements? Yes, it's perfect for mixing pre-workout, protein shakes, or any beverage with ease. Is this bottle suitable for outdoor activities? Definitely! It's lightweight, shatter-resistant, and ideal for sports, gym, and outdoor adventures. How do I clean the bottle? Simply rinse with warm water and mild soap or use a bottle brush for a thorough clean.
